description: Expected results for forbidden index in DataValue test

expected_messages.description: Start message accepted normally - session must be created
DataValue with non-states index sent successfully (no response expected at this stage)
End must yield end_ack(Status_Ok) via the no-op session path because no bulk/delete operations were enqueued

validation_rules.session_consistency: All messages share the same session ID
validation_rules.response_format: Final end_ack must be Status_Ok despite no bulk write happening; without the no-op session fix the notify callback would be stranded and this test would time out
